2_primaryJTBD.decision: Which athlete needs my attention today?

3_decisionVsInfoRatio.assessment: GOOD - Strong decision focus for operational dashboard
3_decisionVsInfoRatio.dominantDecision: No - Multiple competing actions (alerts, athletes, pending)

noiseElements: Profile card might be too prominent for daily-use dashboard
4_visualHierarchy.assessment: MODERATE - Alerts should be more prominent than profile

kpis.note: Tells coach there's work to do, but lacks urgency

5_kpiQuality.assessment: WEAK - Mostly vanity metrics, only 'pending' is actionable

6_languageAndMentalModel.assessment: MODERATE - Mix of Norwegian and English, mostly passive language

7_flowAndNavigationCost.assessment: EXCELLENT - All primary actions are 1 click

8_stateCoverage.assessment: GOOD - Loading/error/empty states handled with StateCard
gaps: No success state for completing pending items
No overloaded state for coaches with many athletes

scalabilityIssues: Athletes list limited to 5 items - may be insufficient for coaches with 20+ athletes
No grouping or filtering beyond search
Mock data fallback suggests incomplete API integration
9_roleScalability.recommendation: Add filters (by category, last active) + pagination for large rosters

10_strategicVerdict.diagnosis: Operational dashboard with weak KPIs and mixed information architecture

topIssues.issue: Weak KPIs - mostly vanity metrics without actionable insights
topIssues.impact: Coach can't make decisions from stats shown

topIssues.issue: Profile card too prominent - takes valuable space on daily-use dashboard
Mock data fallback indicates incomplete API integration

10_strategicVerdict.structuralFix: Replace vanity stats with actionable KPIs (at-risk athletes, overdue plans, response time) + minimize profile card + complete API integration

11_crossPageConsistency.note: Uses PageHeader + PageContainer pattern (consistent). ProfileOverviewCard unique to coach role. Mix of Norwegian and English inconsistent with player pages.

stateHandling.empty: Empty state for pending items (Bell icon + message)

dataSource.note: Fetches from coachesAPI with mock data fallback on error

overallAssessment: MODERATE - Good structure and state handling but needs better KPIs and complete API integration
